mapper.sql: sed.id, sed.se_id, sed.department, sed.administrative_office, sed.team, sed.type, sed.enabled_flag, sed.create_time, sed.create_by, sed.update_time, sed.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.se_id as ${tAlias}_se_id, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
, se.work_card as se_work_card, se.name as se_name, se.department as se_department, se.administrative_office as se_administrative_office , se.station as se_station from swm_emp_dept sed join swm_employee se on sed.se_id = se.id
mapper.insert: insert into swm_emp_dept (se_id, department, administrative_office, team, type, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{seId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_emp_dept set se_id = #{seId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
